$schema_note: Items are sorted newest first. The top 5 render in README. Keep `en` and `zh` strings under 140 chars each.

items.en: One-command installer shipped for HiAPI skills: `npx -y github:HiAPIAI/hiapi-gpt-image-2-skill -y`. Supports local agent skill directories.
items.zh: HiAPI skill 一行命令安装上线：`npx -y github:HiAPIAI/hiapi-gpt-image-2-skill -y`，支持本地 Agent skill 目录。

items.en: New repo `awesome-seedance-2-0-prompts` launched with 160+ Seedance 2.0 video recipes across 8 categories.
items.zh: 新仓 `awesome-seedance-2-0-prompts` 上线，160+ Seedance 2.0 视频配方，覆盖 8 大类目。

items.en: Added community reference prompt picks — fresh examples across portrait, poster, character, and UI categories.
items.zh: 新增社区参考精选案例，覆盖人像、海报、角色、界面四大方向。

items.en: Sources, NOTICE, and per-locale README copy cleaned up; case attribution discipline tightened.
items.zh: 整理来源、NOTICE 与双语 README 文案；案例署名规范进一步收紧。

items.en: Repo positioned as API-ready creative recipes — every case links to HiAPI Draw with model and ratio prefilled.
items.zh: 整体定位调整为 API 可用的创作配方——每个案例都带 HiAPI Draw 预填链接，模型和比例都已配好。
